prompt: Showdown check: Hero has top pair. Villain only has a pair of sevens. Who wins?
intro_v1: Read the real cards first. The winner should come from visible hand and board truth, not from prompt wording alone.
why_v1: Top pair beats an underpair here before kicker detail matters.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Hero wins with the stronger pair.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The ace on the board pairs hero's hand, while pocket sevens stay below that pair, so the higher pair wins at showdown.
